content.text:
All 33 tests pass. Summary of work:

- **`src/components/shell/ThemeToggle.tsx`** (NEW): single button cycling dark→light→system→dark, with glyphs ●/○/◐, dynamic `aria-label="Theme: <choice>"`, persists to `localStorage["theme"]`, applies `data-theme` to `<html>`, and live-follows OS via `matchMedia` while in system mode.
- **`src/components/shell/ThemeInit.tsx`**: rewritten inline script to mirror §B3 (uses the literal `data-theme`, `saved`, `sys`, `effective` form) — still inlined into `<head>` for no-FOUC.
- **`src/components/shell/SiteHeader.tsx`**: imports and renders `<ThemeToggle>` to the right of the nav, before the hamburger.
- **`src/components/shell/MobileDrawer.tsx`**: renders `<ThemeToggle>` at the top of the drawer panel (after the close button, before the nav).
- **`src/components/shell/SiteFooter.tsx`**: NOT modified — §B4 explicitly says toggle is *not* in the footer; that supersedes the §A note.
- **`src/styles/primitives.css`**: added `.shell-theme-toggle`, `.shell-header__theme`, `.shell-drawer__theme` styles matching the existing hamburger/close button pattern.

Verifications:
- §C1 `test -f ThemeToggle.tsx` → present.
- §C2 `grep 'localStorage.setItem("theme"'` → matches at line 56.
- §C3 `grep 'data-theme' ThemeInit.tsx` → matches.
- `npm run typecheck` clean. `npm run lint` clean for the touched files (warnings only in pre-existing `_legacy_v1`). `npm test` 33/33 passing.

IMPL_RESULT: PASS

result:
All 33 tests pass. Summary of work:

- **`src/components/shell/ThemeToggle.tsx`** (NEW): single button cycling dark→light→system→dark, with glyphs ●/○/◐, dynamic `aria-label="Theme: <choice>"`, persists to `localStorage["theme"]`, applies `data-theme` to `<html>`, and live-follows OS via `matchMedia` while in system mode.
- **`src/components/shell/ThemeInit.tsx`**: rewritten inline script to mirror §B3 (uses the literal `data-theme`, `saved`, `sys`, `effective` form) — still inlined into `<head>` for no-FOUC.
- **`src/components/shell/SiteHeader.tsx`**: imports and renders `<ThemeToggle>` to the right of the nav, before the hamburger.
- **`src/components/shell/MobileDrawer.tsx`**: renders `<ThemeToggle>` at the top of the drawer panel (after the close button, before the nav).
- **`src/components/shell/SiteFooter.tsx`**: NOT modified — §B4 explicitly says toggle is *not* in the footer; that supersedes the §A note.
- **`src/styles/primitives.css`**: added `.shell-theme-toggle`, `.shell-header__theme`, `.shell-drawer__theme` styles matching the existing hamburger/close button pattern.

Verifications:
- §C1 `test -f ThemeToggle.tsx` → present.
- §C2 `grep 'localStorage.setItem("theme"'` → matches at line 56.
- §C3 `grep 'data-theme' ThemeInit.tsx` → matches.
- `npm run typecheck` clean. `npm run lint` clean for the touched files (warnings only in pre-existing `_legacy_v1`). `npm test` 33/33 passing.
